Hey Jake!
Oh, hi there dear reader I didn't see you there😊
Yea so I noticed you starting a writing everyday thread.
Thanks for noticing!
It humbles me when people read my posts.
Yeaa so between your 6th and 8th post two months went by
Whats up with that?
Oh well .. hmm .. I uh ..
You see January was an interesting month.
I had many life changes:
Oh ok
Got divorced,
That sucks
learned someone fully believes I live with no empathy
ok.. You really don't have to
sense of purpose and reality was shaken to the core of my being
share personal details
I just wanted to know if you are writing everyday?
😅 I have taken a step back
I have been writing to myself
reading alot about writing
I hope to more regularly post
I am figuring out an easy way to have rss
rss?
Yea, its this really awesome technology that lets you
subscribe and read different people's posts
I'll let you know when I make a post about it
Thank you for reaching out, you made my day!
